# fix(test): resolve all 63 unit test warnings

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `951b9149def3` — fix(test): resolve all 63 unit test warnings

**Body**:

The unit test suite emitted 63 warnings across 10 categories,
masking real issues and eroding signal-to-noise in CI output.
Every warning is now resolved at its source — no filterwarnings
suppressions except for the one intentional code path in
make_handler_workflow.

Production fix:
- Replace datetime.utcnow() with datetime.now(UTC) in
  kailash_mcp subscriptions (Python 3.12 deprecation)

Test fixes:
- Add channel.close() / yield+cleanup to CLIChannel fixtures
  and test methods (22 ResourceWarnings)
- Add disconnect/close to AsyncSQLDatabaseNode and aiosqlite
  connections in MCP, security, pool, and queue tests (~20 warnings)
- Use 32-byte JWT test secret per RFC 7518 §3.2 (2 InsecureKeyLengthWarnings)
- Rename TestConditionalRuntime → ConditionalRuntimeStub to avoid
  pytest collection of helper class with __init__ (1 PytestCollectionWarning)
- Add .hypothesis to norecursedirs in pytest.ini (1 UserWarning)
- Use Mock(new_callable=Mock) instead of AsyncMock for patches where
  async side_effects handle coroutine creation directly (4 RuntimeWarnings)
- Add @pytest.mark.filterwarnings for make_handler_workflow tests
  that intentionally trigger instance-based API usage (1 UserWarning)
- Close WorkflowServer/LocalRuntime/AsyncLocalRuntime in gateway,
  validation audit, and queue factory tests (remaining ResourceWarnings)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
